title: Hardware Description Language (HDL) Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for common HDL commands and syntax.

commands.description: Use a signal assignment in VHDL
commands.scenario: Use a signal assignment in VHDL

commands.command:
always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
  if (rst) begin
    data_out <= 8'b0;
  end else begin
    // logic here
  end
end
